basic_details.job_title: EXIM Bank Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: EXIM Bank has released the official Officer – Infrastructure Group Notification 2026 at eximbankindia.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the EXIM Bank Officer – Infrastructure Group Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged not more than 45 years as on 30 April 2026 with a qualification of full-time Post Graduate Diploma / Degree in Finance or International Business with minimum 60% marks from a recognized University can apply via email on or before 23 May 2026. The official notification PDF and email application instructions are available below.

age_limit.age_details: Not more than 45 years as on April 30, 2026.
age_limit.details: Not more than 45 years as on April 30, 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Full-time Post Graduate Diploma / Degree in Finance / International Business with minimum 60% marks from a recognized University.
qualification.details: Officer - Infrastructure Group: Full-time Post Graduate Diploma / Degree in Finance / International Business with minimum 60% marks from a recognized University. Minimum 15 years of post-qualification experience in areas of banking, development finance, financial sector policy, infrastructure finance, or related areas. Experience of working with Government, regulators, DFIs, or multilateral institutions is essential. Exposure to corporate lending, project finance, policy formulation, and credit risk management is desirable.

salary_details.details: Rs. 26.71 lakh per annum with annual increments for 15 years of work experience. The compensation has fixed and variable components in the ratio of 80:20. The compensation will increase as per the Bank's pay matrix for candidates having more work experience.

selection_process: Shortlisting based on eligibility criteria Personal Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for EXIM Bank Officer - Infrastructure Group Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 23-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the EXIM Bank Officer - Infrastructure Group recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 23rd May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the bank before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a full-time Post Graduate Diploma or Degree in Finance or International Business with a minimum of 60% marks from a recognized university.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Officer - Infrastructure Group position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applicants is 45 years as of April 30, 2026. There is no minimum age specified.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Officer - Infrastructure Group post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Officer - Infrastructure Group position in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for this role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive an annual salary of Rs. 26.71 lakh, with potential annual increments for experienced professionals.

faq.question: Q6. What type of job is this recruitment for?
faq.answer: This recruitment is for a contractual position. The job type is specified as 'Contract'.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Eligible candidates need to send their resume via email to the specified address. The application mode is email.

faq.question: Q8. What is the required experience for the Officer - Infrastructure Group role?
faq.answer: A minimum of 15 years of post-qualification experience in banking, development finance, or related fields is essential.

faq.question: Q9. What are the key components of the selection process?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting candidates based on their eligibility criteria, followed by a personal interview.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any application fee for this recruitment drive.
